package rulefixtures

// scenario for malformed_struct_tag: Struct field tags that do not parse as valid Go tag key/value pairs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: consistency; severity: contextual.
type Rule230NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario230Negative(records []Rule230NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
